raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"tool","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I think I'll try out Evernote for storing my digital coupons.","distilled_fact":"The user will try out Evernote for storing digital coupons."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"tool_usage","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"I already use it for other notes, so it makes sense to keep everything in one place.","distilled_fact":"The user already uses Evernote for other notes."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"mail_delivery","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"I've been getting a lot of coupons in the mail lately, especially for my favorite snacks.","distilled_fact":"The user has been getting a lot of coupons in the mail lately, especially for the user's favorite snacks."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"coupon","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I got a great one for $1 off a box of granola bars, which I always seem to need.","distilled_fact":"The user got a coupon for $1 off a box of granola bars."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"preference","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"which I always seem to need","distilled_fact":"The user always seems to need a box of granola bars."}]}
